summary: Fixed critical impersonation bugs: 1) User step data not loading when impersonating (showed empty/beginning state), 2) Partner 'Account Not Linked' when impersonating partner user. Root cause: Backend get_current_user() prioritized cookies over Bearer token. Fixed by: a) Backend: Bearer token now checked first, b) Frontend: Added axios request interceptor with setAuthToken() that AuthContext calls on every auth state change. All 44 backend tests pass.
passed_tests: test_impersonation.py: 7/7 passed (admin impersonate user, partner, token works, non-admin denied, 404, audit log, estimated completion)
test_partner_api.py: 10/10 passed (user detail, access control, progress update, logout x3)
test_settings_api.py: 14/14 passed (settings CRUD, existing APIs, admin dashboard)
test_step_duration.py: 7/7 passed (duration fields, update, estimated completion, timestamps, calculation)
test_iteration17_features.py: 6/6 passed + 1 skipped (duplicate fix, step data display, partner complete)

rca_of_the_issue.bug_1_description: Impersonating a user who completed steps showed them at beginning with no data
rca_of_the_issue.bug_2_description: Impersonating a partner user showed 'Account Not Linked' error
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Two-layer issue: 1) Backend get_current_user() checked cookies BEFORE Bearer token. Browser sent admin's httpOnly cookie alongside impersonated Bearer token - cookie won. 2) Frontend api.js axios instance had no way to inject the impersonated token into requests.
fix_applied: Backend: Swapped token extraction order in get_current_user() - Bearer token checked first, cookies as fallback
Frontend: Added setAuthToken() export + axios request interceptor in api.js
Frontend: AuthContext calls setAuthToken() on login, impersonate, stopImpersonation, and logout
Frontend: Impersonated token stored in sessionStorage for page refresh persistence
